gap_analysis.recommended_positioning:
Objective: Position the Pigeon Air Fryer as the go-to affordable and healthy cooking solution for budget-conscious Indian home cooks. | Approach: ['Highlight health benefits and ease of use in comparison to traditional cooking methods.', 'Leverage social proof with testimonials and user-generated content.', 'Create educational content addressing beginner mistakes and comparisons with competitors.'] | Channels: ['Instagram Reels', 'YouTube Shorts', 'Twitter Threads', 'Blog Content', 'Facebook Groups'] | Messaging: ['Affordable health-focused cooking for Indian kitchens.', 'Cook smarter, eat healthier without breaking the bank!', 'Say goodbye to oily food—hello to healthy meals with Pigeon Air Fryer.']

campaign.campaign_strategy:
Objective: Position the Pigeon Air Fryer as the go-to affordable and healthy cooking solution for budget-conscious Indian home cooks. | Approach: ['Highlight health benefits and ease of use in comparison to traditional cooking methods.', 'Leverage social proof with testimonials and user-generated content.', 'Create educational content addressing beginner mistakes and comparisons with competitors.'] | Channels: ['Instagram Reels', 'YouTube Shorts', 'Twitter Threads', 'Blog Content', 'Facebook Groups'] | Messaging: ['Affordable health-focused cooking for Indian kitchens.', 'Cook smarter, eat healthier without breaking the bank!', 'Say goodbye to oily food—hello to healthy meals with Pigeon Air Fryer.']

Identity context: Product image attached (61GlLfqLt0L._SL1500_1200x.webp).

Why settle for greasy meals? Switch to air frying with Pigeon and enjoy guilt-free indulgence 😋 #HealthyEating
